languages.text: {n}Вы слышали домыслы и страшные байки пьяных пустотников о металлических созданиях, не знающих смерти. Ни одна из этих историй не звучала убедительно и правдоподобно.{/n}
{n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы слышали домыслы и страшные байки пьяных пустотников о металлических созданиях, не знающих смерти. Ни одна из этих историй не звучала убедительно и правдоподобно.{/n}

{n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}
{n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Has oído, de boca de viajeros del vacío borrachos, historias de terror y especulaciones sobre criaturas metálicas que no conocen la muerte. Ninguna de ellas sonaba remotamente creíble, ni mucho menos convincente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Has oído, de boca de viajeros del vacío borrachos, historias de terror y especulaciones sobre criaturas metálicas que no conocen la muerte. Ninguna de ellas sonaba remotamente creíble, ni mucho menos convincente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你从那些醉醺醺的虚空旅者口中，听到过关于不死金属生物的可怕传说和猜测。那些故事没有一个听起来靠谱，更别说有说服力了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你从那些醉醺醺的虚空旅者口中，听到过关于不死金属生物的可怕传说和猜测。那些故事没有一个听起来靠谱，更别说有说服力了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous souvenez avoir entendu des voyageurs stellaires complètement saouls évoquer des créatures de métal insensibles à la mort. Aucune de ces terrifiantes histoires ne vous a jamais paru plausible, ou même convaincante.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous souvenez avoir entendu des voyageurs stellaires complètement saouls évoquer des créatures de métal insensibles à la mort. Aucune de ces terrifiantes histoires ne vous a jamais paru plausible, ou même convaincante.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du hast von betrunkenen Raumfahrern haarsträubende Geschichten und Spekulationen über metallene Kreaturen gehört, die nicht sterben. Keine dieser Geschichten klang plausibel, geschweige denn überzeugend.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hast von betrunkenen Raumfahrern haarsträubende Geschichten und Spekulationen über metallene Kreaturen gehört, die nicht sterben. Keine dieser Geschichten klang plausibel, geschweige denn überzeugend.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは酔っぱらったボイドフェアラーたちから、死を知らない金属生物についての恐ろしい話や憶測を聞いたことがあるだろう。どれももっともらしく聞こえなかったし、説得力もなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You have heard from drunken voidfarers dread tales and speculation about metal creatures that do not know death. None of these stories ever sounded plausible, let alone convincing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sarhoş gemicilerden ölümü bilmeyen metal yaratıklar hakkında korkunç hikâyeler ve spekülasyonlar duymuştun. Bu hikâyelerin hiçbiri, ikna edici olmayı geçtim mantıklı bile gelmemişti.{/n}
